title: Where Are You Lord

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hear my whispered prayer, O Lord
As I hide myself away
Evil stalks the city walls
Darkness rules another day
Violence echoes through these streets
While deceit fills every square
Terror grips my trembling heart
Death's shadow lingers there

sections.label: Chorus
lines: But I will call upon my God
When evening falls and morning breaks
He hears my voice above the storm
My soul, at last, He'll take
My soul, at last, He'll take

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Once we walked as closest friends
Through the temple side by side
Now your words are poisoned thorns
In the darkness where you hide
Casting burdens on the Lord
He sustains through darkest night
While the wicked fall to pits
Before their time takes flight

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Peace seems distant as the stars
Covenant shattered like glass
But God's throne remains unmoved
This storm, too, shall pass

sections.label: Chorus
lines: But I will call upon my God
When evening falls and morning breaks
He hears my voice above the storm
My soul, at last, He'll take

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Let your wings spread over me
Like a dove, I long to flee
To the wilderness of peace
Where my spirit can breathe free
Though betrayal breaks my heart
Though destruction reigns below
I will trust the Lord my God
This one thing I know

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: But I will call upon my God
When evening falls and morning breaks
He hears my voice above the storm
My soul, at last, He'll take

sections.label: Outro
lines: Cast your burden on the Lord
He will sustain
Cast your burden on the Lord
He remains

epigraph: Cast thy burden upon the LORD
